trigger: manual — user requested batch A infrastructure

tasks.description: Commit pending settings.json changes, gitignore settings.local.json (contains tokens)
Verify tars CI — confirm System.Text.Json 8.0.5 fix resolved T005 test failure
Triage 26 dependabot alerts — 14 System.Text.Json (already fixed, dismissed), 12 npm/pip in generated projects (dismissed as non-production)
Finalize ix-dashboard PDCA — Act decision: standardize. Hypothesis validated, conscience blind spot addressed.

lessons_learned: Dependabot alerts in generated demo projects create noise — consider .gitignore for output/ and .tars/projects/ lock files
System.Text.Json alerts were stale after cycle 002 fix — dependabot doesn't auto-dismiss when fix is in different projects than alert paths
